string-array.name: whats_new_items
string-array.item: Game Booster (PRO) — one-tap real boost: free RAM, purge cache, mute interruptions, launch the game
Per-game profiles + suppressed in-app ads during the session
Cleaning history — see lifetime GB reclaimed; PRO unlocks full history + CSV export
AI Assistant — 3 analyses/day free, unlimited with PRO
Honest brand kept: no fake FPS, no inflated RAM numbers — only real measured deltas
Pro page refreshed with the new benefits
